title: hymenophyllum decurrens
intro: Hymenophyllum decurrens, also known as the Decurrent Hymenophyllum or Decurrent filmy fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum decurrens include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
